title: common/pkg/config: check systemd /run/systemd/system
body:
When `/proc` is mounted with `hidepid` > 0, `/proc/1/comm` is not readable from non-root users. Rootless containers would assume they run without Systemd whereas Systemd might actually be running. 

Fixes: #335

comments.body: Thanks but this doesn't compile and it is no the correct way to check for systemd, see https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/335#issuecomment-3280126276
ACK (consolidation is always nice) but I’d like a review by someone knowledgeable in this area.
